products.name: Agentic Firewall
products.tagline: Kill infinite loops. Cut API waste by 40%.
products.reply_template: I built a proxy called {name} that sits between your agent and ANY provider (Anthropic, OpenAI, Gemini, NIM) — it detects loops, kills runaway calls, and tracks every dollar. {tagline} Check it out: {landing}

products.name: Waste Scanner
products.tagline: Free CLI — see exactly how much your agents waste in 30 seconds.
products.reply_template: I made a free CLI that scans your agent logs and shows you exactly where the money goes — duplicate reads, loops, overkill model usage. Run `{npm}` and it generates a 'Grief Report' in 30 seconds. No signup, fully local.

products.name: Context Shredder
products.reply_template: I built {name} — a proxy that compresses your conversation history into a high-density 'State Digest' before it hits the API. {tagline} It preserves your last 4 messages intact and extracts goals/decisions/errors from older ones. Drop-in replacement, one line config change.

products.name: Agentic CFO
products.tagline: Budget governance for AI agents — never get a surprise bill again.
products.reply_template: I built {name} — it sits between your agents and the API, scores every call 0-10 for necessity, and hard-blocks anything over budget. {tagline} Set per-agent dollar limits and get Slack alerts before you hit them.

products.name: Resolution Arbitrator
products.tagline: Verify your AI actually resolved tickets — don't trust the close button.
products.reply_template: I built {name} because I saw the same thing — AI agents marking tickets 'resolved' when the customer's actual question wasn't answered. It runs 5 signal checks (deflection, action presence, follow-up avoidance, etc.) and overrules false resolutions before they close.

products.name: JENNi
products.reply_template: I built {name} to help with exactly this — it uses AI to analyze Amazon categories, find low-competition niches, and estimate margins before you commit inventory. {tagline}

products.name: Judgment-to-Cash
products.tagline: Turn your Bexar County default judgment into recovered dollars.
products.reply_template: My team built {name} to automate exactly this for Bexar County default judgments. We underwrite the collectability for free, e-file the enforcement (like garnishments), and only take a fee if we recover funds. {tagline} You can assign it here: {url}

products.name: Vibe Billing OpenClaw Scanner
products.tagline: Free CLI — check your OpenClaw logs to see exactly how much money you wasted.
products.reply_template: Hey, your agent probably got stuck in a loop. You can check exactly how much you wasted by running `{npm}` in your terminal. It analyzes your local OpenClaw logs directly.
